approach: Deliver the adaptation-question catalog as content-owned YAML records under content/adaptation-questions/ (with a plain-node lint), rendered questions also as real survey modules so facet-lint passes, and update feeding facet records' consumers (FR-008). The one new engine surface is an inheritance-posture confirmation step; script-alignment reuses Prefill.tsx and trust policy renders as flow questions. Firing conditions read the 036/037 facet index behind an injected evidence seam so everything is walkable against a mocked index now.

decisions.decision: Catalog is a content-owned data set (content/adaptation-questions/) plus real survey modules for rendered questions
decisions.why: FlowQuestion has no home for firing-condition/scope/no-evidence metadata; SC-001 requires facet-lint prefills to resolve to real ids; matches the facet-catalog convention the spec cites
decisions.rejected: Fields on the survey module, extending facet records, or a spec-only paper enumeration

decisions.decision: Firing conditions read the facet index behind an injected AdaptationEvidence seam
decisions.why: 036/037 land the index but live consumption/ranking wiring is an explicit follow-up feature; an injected seam makes US1-US3 authorable and unit-testable against a mocked index now, matching the glottolog-bridge/classifier injected-deps convention
decisions.rejected: Reading docs/keyboard-facet-index.json directly (couples studio to artifact path, defeats mocked-index tests, pre-empts the wiring feature)

decisions.decision: Only new engine surface is the inheritance-posture step; ban firingCondition:always via lint
decisions.why: Assumptions name the posture step as the one likely-missing surface; SC-002/SC-003 make non-interruption the headline bar, so encode it as a lint invariant
decisions.rejected: A generic reusable posture-matrix component; structured predicate AST at candidate stage

plan.summary: Planned the 9-question adaptation catalog as content data + real survey modules, one new inheritance-posture engine surface, and an injected mockable evidence seam
plan.key_finding: facet-lint keys off real survey question ids, so the catalog cannot be paper-only; and the inheritance-posture confirmation surface is the sole engine touchpoint (grep confirms none exists today)

tasks.summary: 38 tasks across 6 phases: Setup (catalog dir plus C1-C8 lint), Foundational (evidence seam, TrustPolicy, recordConfirmation, catalog loader, firing core), US1 script-alignment (P1/MVP), US2 inheritance-posture (P2), US3 trust-policy (P3), Polish; each story is red-test-first waves with shared-file serialization on firing.ts and the Phase B flow yaml

FR-001.title: Every question record declares id, elicited preference, firing condition, prefill source, provenance-chip text, and consumers

FR-002.title: Catalog covers script-alignment, inheritance-posture, and trust-policy families with at least 3 questions each

FR-003.title: Every question is 3c-conformant: prefilled with provenance chip, never applied silently

FR-004.title: Every question has a defined no-evidence degradation (ask-plainly or record-no-default)

FR-005.title: Inheritance-posture answers consumable en masse; individual overrides do not silently rewrite the posture

FR-006.title: Trust-policy answers scoped explicitly; fallback-tier classifications always visually distinguishable

FR-007.title: Confirmations and overrides recorded in a form the facet evaluation harness can consume

FR-008.title: Session-facet records updated in the same change with consumer wiring

FR-009.title: Named-orthography prescriptions only arise as an author-confirmed opt-in join
